areas.name: Greenwood Breach
areas.description: A short incursion through corrupted forest trails. Good for fresh parties and risky solo attempts.

areas.name: Venom Mire
areas.description: A longer route through poisoned ruins where support enemies and elites pressure the party.

areas.name: Cinder Spire
areas.description: A five-floor climb into dragon fire. Bosses hit harder and the final stretch expects a tuned deck.
